programSummary: CARSI designations complement the IICRC — Southern-Hemisphere training the IICRC does not offer, produced for Australian and New Zealand conditions: AS/NZS standards, 230 V/10 A power, metric units and our climate. They are not IICRC certifications and do not use IICRC designations; each is a distinct CARSI-issued credential earned through CARSI CEC-accredited training that also earns IICRC Continuing Education Credits (CECs) toward maintaining an existing IICRC certification.
positioning: Complements the IICRC — we offer Southern-Hemisphere courses they do not. Not an IICRC certification; earns IICRC CECs.

designations.name: CARSI Water Restoration Practitioner
designations.summary: The Southern Hemisphere credential for professional water damage restoration — water categories and classes, hazard-led safety, moisture assessment, drying principles and documentation.

designations.name: CARSI Structural Drying Practitioner
designations.summary: The Southern Hemisphere credential for applied structural drying — the dry standard, metric psychrometry, airflow and dehumidifier selection, 230 V/10 A drying-system design and electrical safety.

designations.name: CARSI Mould Remediation Practitioner
designations.summary: The Southern Hemisphere credential for professional mould remediation — mould biology and health, Condition 1/2/3 assessment, containment, the correct remediation sequence, PPE by condition and verification.

designations.name: CARSI Contaminated-Water Practitioner
designations.summary: The Southern Hemisphere credential for Category 3 contaminated-water work — hazard-led risk assessment and SWMS, biohazard PPE and decontamination, Australian-registered products, and lawful disposal under state EPA / water authority.

designations.name: CARSI Fire & Smoke Restoration Practitioner
designations.summary: The Southern Hemisphere credential for fire and smoke damage restoration — smoke and soot behaviour, residue types and cleaning-method selection, structural deodorisation, corrosion urgency, and Australian bushfire-ash and asbestos-in-debris hazards.

designations.name: CARSI Trauma & Biohazard Decontamination Practitioner
designations.summary: The Southern Hemisphere credential for trauma and biohazard decontamination — bloodborne-pathogen safety, biohazard PPE, decontamination sequence, clinical-waste disposal, and worker psychological safety.

designations.name: CARSI Carpet Cleaning Practitioner
designations.summary: The Southern Hemisphere credential for professional carpet cleaning — carpet fibres and soil, hot-water extraction and encapsulation, method selection, stain treatment and correct drying.

designations.name: CARSI Timber Floor Restoration Practitioner
designations.summary: The Southern Hemisphere credential for timber floor assessment and restoration — Australian timber species, cupping and crowning, moisture measurement, the dry standard, subfloor ventilation and electrical safety.

designations.name: CARSI Indoor Environment Assessment Practitioner
designations.summary: The Southern Hemisphere credential for assessing indoor environment conditions — indoor environmental quality, psychrometry, moisture inspection, mould recognition, assessor competency and defensible reporting.
